positive: A mystical forest creature, blending elements of a fox and a majestic raven, standing on a crescent moon glowing through dense mist. The creature has a sleek, vibrant fur coat with deep sapphire and burnt orange hues, contrasted by obsidian black wings. The background should feature bioluminescent flora and root systems, creating an ethereal, dreamlike atmosphere. Style should be highly detailed gothic fantasy linework, mixed with the clean, striking aesthetic of vector art. Composition must be central and symmetrical, emphasizing the silhouette and dramatic contrast. Use dramatic rim lighting from behind to make the edges pop, with a limited, rich color palette of indigo, sapphire, amber, and black. Perfect for apparel print.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, low quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, poorly drawn, distorted, logos, trademarks, copyrighted, celebrity, cartoonish, realistic photograph, gradient wash, overly complex details
